_meta.note: Tracks the origin of each ontology artifact. v0.2.0-0.2.2 modelled Frente I Fatia 1 (ADR-0004). v0.2.7 SYNC (2026-06-21, commit df90fa6 deployed): materialized the 2 new entities (Permuta — alocação consumada, ADR-0008, partial; ClienteFiltro — config de roteamento, ADR-0007, implemented), added the PERMUTA_MANUAL state + derived tipoPermuta to the elegibilidade state-machine (ADR-0007/0009), and synced impl_files/status of the Fatia-1 entities/actions/rules from 'planned' to 'implemented' (the deployed code now implements them). Gap gate-3-pago-via-detail RESOLVED in impl. Write-back fin010 (reconciliarPermuta, Fase 3) remains planned. Nothing imported from upstream.
